title: SIRP
wikitext:
[]: SIRP             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Oct 12, 2009 4:40 pm Hey I picked up the 2nd volume of SIRP and lo and behold I saw a shout at to the forum in Misato's Fan Service Corner! And also this might go in Revuild or the Draft thread, but Kaworu's intent in the SIRP manga SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Mon Oct 12, 2009 6:09 pm In that volume, who are the people whose fanart was printed? I'm wondering if someone I know got their stuff in..

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Oct 12, 2009 6:24 pm Brian Gin of UC Berkeley.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Oct 12, 2009 7:06 pm On a related note, EM, Tines or anyone who MIGHT have the RAW of SIRP up to the chapter that EMF put up for download, I was wondering about a character in the later volumes/chapters i think it was 18 or in the 20's? but when Shinji and the others are having a picnic is the woman with long hair that joins them Asuka's mother, Kyoko? Can anybody answer that for me?

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Mon Oct 12, 2009 7:37 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: Brian Gin of UC Berkeley.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Mon Oct 12, 2009 11:32 pm Oh man I was gonna post this and I forgot. I saw and it and was like zomg I post there!
